raise_justifications.backend/routers/developer.py: GET /v1/dev/user/memories serves the authoritative legacy memories collection for legacy-cohort accounts with no rollout state (#9892), keeping the narrow deny/fallback decision in the route that owns the read contract.
raise_justifications.backend/routers/chat.py: PTT stereo rejection keeps the serving STT provider boundary explicit in the established chat admission owner. +36 from the fork-main sync merge unioning the fork's Windows-platform threading and stream-error fallback with upstream's JourneyAttempt/TranscriptionAttempt observability in the same closures.
raise_justifications.backend/routers/sync.py: Fresh Sync's daily ceiling remains beside the existing fresh-admission gates, before staged audio or durable worker work is created.
raise_justifications.backend/routers/users.py: GET /v1/users/subscription serializes the new mobile plus/max plans as `unlimited` for clients whose plan enum predates them, so day-one buyers read as paid instead of Free (mirrors the existing operator remap); real limits/grandfather are computed from the true plan first.
raise_justifications.backend/routers/mcp_sse.py: MCP SSE memory reads route their legacy-fallback decision through the shared mcp_legacy_read_authorized helper (#9892); one import line.
